deploy.startCommand: bash -lc 'D="${DATA_DIR:-/data}"; echo "=== DISK USAGE ==="; df -h "$D" 2>&1 || true; echo "=== /data BREAKDOWN ==="; du -sh "$D"/* 2>/dev/null | sort -h || true; echo "=== CLEANUP TEMPFILES ==="; find "$D/deliveries" -name "*.part" -delete 2>/dev/null; find "$D" -name "*.tmp" -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "cleanup ok"; if [ "${MORTHE_PURGE_DELIVERIES:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "=== PURGE DELIVERIES (MORTHE_PURGE_DELIVERIES=1) ==="; find "$D/deliveries" -type f -print -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "purge done"; fi; if [ "${MORTHE_PURGE_THUMBS:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "=== PURGE THUMB CACHE (MORTHE_PURGE_THUMBS=1) ==="; find "$D/thumb_cache" -type f -print -delete 2>/dev/null; echo "purge done"; fi; echo "=== POST-CLEANUP DISK ==="; df -h "$D" 2>&1 || true; echo "=== STARTING UVICORN ==="; exec uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT'
